questions: Does the patient feel exhausted or fatigued? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have frequent vomiting? (Yes/No)
Does the fever abate after jaundice appears? (Yes/No)

Does the patient exhibit any of the following: Alteration in sleep pattern, altered behaviour, abnormal movements, persistent vomiting, dehydration, decreased urinary output, bleeding from any site, or any other complication? (Yes/No)
